title: lilium convallium
intro: Lilium convallium, also known as the Convallaria Lily or Lily of the Valley, is a flowering plant belonging to the lily family. Traditionally, the plant's roots and rhizomes have been used in herbal medicine, known for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and cardiac stimulant effects. The health benefits of Lilium convallium include its ability to reduce anxiety, lower blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of heart conditions, as well as its potential to treat epilepsy and other neurological disorders. The plant is commonly prepared as a tincture, syrup, or tea, and is also used in perfumes and fragrances due to its sweet, floral scent.
